title: Remove "Creator" Music Discs
description: This simple datapack removes the drop of the "Creator" music disc from Ominous Vaults and the "Creator (Music Box)" disc from pots in Trial Chambers.
body:
This simple datapack removes the drop of the "Creator" music disc from Ominous Vaults and the "Creator (Music Box)" disc from pots in Trial Chambers.

**What it does:**  
- Prevents Ominous Vaults from dropping the "Creator" music disc when opened.  
- Removes the "Creator (Music Box)" disc from loot pools of pots in Trial Chambers.  
- All other loot from these sources remains unchanged.  

**Installation:**  
1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.  
2. Place it in the `datapacks` folder of your world save.  
3. Type `/reload` in-game.
